message:
feat(robot): wire attention feed into dashboard and terse output, harden profile/event defensiveness

Integrate the attention feed into both dashboard and terse output
surfaces, fix profile safety issues, and add defensive copies:

Dashboard output (robot_dashboard.go):
- DashboardOutput gains Attention *SnapshotAttentionSummary field
- GetDashboard() populates attention summary
- printDashboardMarkdown() adds attention headline row and new
  "## Attention" section with summary table, top action items,
  suggested next steps, and unsupported signals disclosure
- New helpers: writeAttentionSection(), dashboardAttentionHeadline(),
  escapeMarkdownCell()

Terse output (robot.go):
- TerseState gains AttentionAction/AttentionInterest fields
- String() emits ^: segment (e.g., ^:2a,4i or ^:0)
- ParseTerse() handles ^: format
- TerseOutput gains AttentionHint field (e.g., "2!action 5?interest")
- GetTerse() queries attention feed for per-session counts and global hint
- New: buildAttentionHint(), buildAttentionHintFromSummary(), formatTerseLine()
- Help text adds "Attention Feed (Operator Loop)" section with canonical
  4-step tending workflow

Attention contract hardening (attention_contract.go):
- New constants: EventCategoryHealth, EventTypeSpawn
- Deep-copy profile accessors: cloneProfileFilters(), cloneAttentionProfile()
- GetProfile() returns cloned profile (prevents builtin mutation)
- ListProfiles() deep-copies each entry
- severityMeetsMinimum() fix: add SeverityCritical to ordering map,
  handle empty min (returns true) and unknown values (returns false)

Event bus defensive copies (bus.go, webhook_event.go):
- NewFileConflictEvent() copies agents slice before storing
- NewWebhookEvent() uses cloneStringMap() for details map

TUI dashboard (dashboard.go):
- Extract inline IIFE for styled section labels into named variable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
